title: cypripedium × ventricosum var. virescens
intro: Cypripedium × ventricosum var. virescens, also known as the green-tinged lady's slipper orchid, is a hybrid plant derived from the cross between Cypripedium parviflorum and Cypripedium reginae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing skin conditions, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Cypripedium × ventricosum var. virescens include tinctures, teas, and salves, which can be used topically or internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
